features: THE SHEARS 3.0: All your nail care grooming essentials come kitted in a travel-friendly, water-resistant hard case with a magnetic closure. Inside, each stainless-steel tool is held firmly in place so you can toss it in your gym bag or carry-on with confidence.
EQUIPPED TO CLIP: Sized with men’s hands and feet in mind, both nail clippers are precision-sharpened with rust-resistant swing-out nail files built in.

TAKE THE EDGE OFF: The medium-grit stainless steel nail file has rounded edges to give you more control to shape and smooth. The slant-tip tweezers are equipped with grip touchpoints to help prevent slipping no matter how tiny the task.
CUTICLES, CHECK: The Shears 3.0 cuticle scissors have larger finger holes and a curved blade to easily cut hangnails and overgrown cuticles.
WHAT’S INCLUDED: Fingernail clipper, toenail clipper, steel nail file, slant tip tweezer, cuticle scissors, and water-resistant travel case.
